functions.name: Spring Jakarta namespace migration reference
functions.insertText:
// Spring Boot 3+ / Spring Framework 6+
// Prefer jakarta.persistence and other jakarta.* namespaces.
functions.description: Spring Framework 6 and Spring Boot 3+ use Jakarta EE namespaces such as jakarta.persistence instead of legacy javax.persistence imports.
functions.longDescription:
Spring Framework 6 and Spring Boot 3+ use Jakarta EE namespaces such as jakarta.persistence instead of legacy javax.persistence imports.

functions.name: Reactive pipeline caution reference
functions.insertText:
// Reactor caution
// Keep blocking operations outside event-loop threads.
functions.description: Reactor operators are lazy until subscription. Avoid blocking calls on event-loop threads and select schedulers deliberately when integrating blocking libraries.
functions.longDescription:
Reactor operators are lazy until subscription. Avoid blocking calls on event-loop threads and select schedulers deliberately when integrating blocking libraries.

functions.name: Kafka delivery semantics reference
functions.insertText:
// Kafka delivery-semantics note
// Validate acknowledgements, retry topics and idempotency together.
functions.description: Kafka acknowledgement, retries, idempotence and transactions must be designed together. The chosen listener AckMode alone does not establish end-to-end exactly-once business processing.
functions.longDescription:
Kafka acknowledgement, retries, idempotence and transactions must be designed together. The chosen listener AckMode alone does not establish end-to-end exactly-once business processing.

// Android BLE API-level reference
// Verify runtime permissions and API-specific overloads before deployment.
functions.description: Android BLE direct cards distinguish API 33+ write overloads and retain an explicit permissions note. Verify BLUETOOTH_SCAN and BLUETOOTH_CONNECT requirements against the minSdk, targetSdk and Android version used by the application.
functions.longDescription:
Android BLE direct cards distinguish API 33+ write overloads and retain an explicit permissions note. Verify BLUETOOTH_SCAN and BLUETOOTH_CONNECT requirements against the minSdk, targetSdk and Android version used by the application.
